title: EU buyers can't buy your prints. Here's why.
description: Most US Etsy sellers list only inch-based sizes — 4×6, 8×10, 8×12. EU, UK, and Australian buyers need A4, A3, and A5. Without ISO files your listing is invisible to 40%+ of the market. SnapToSize generates the full ISO pack (A5, A4, A3, A2, A1) at 300 DPI in one upload. snaptosize.com
